definition: Canonical public study-level input table for the TcCO2-PaCO2 agreement model
description: CSV source table used by package workflows and browser staging
source_or_origin: Conway Thorax evidence synthesis and Figshare source archive
derivation_or_transformation: Curated from source study summaries into repository schema
validation_rules: must parse as CSV and satisfy validate_conway_studies_df
notes: Primary public model input

definition: Excel copy of the canonical Conway study table
description: Spreadsheet form for review and study additions
derivation_or_transformation: Same rows and columns as canonical CSV
notes: Used for manual review and study updates

definition: Blank or template workbook for adding Conway-compatible studies
derivation_or_transformation: Structured to match Conway study schema
validation_rules: must contain required Conway schema columns
notes: Use docs/ADDING_STUDIES.md before editing

definition: Public count fallback used when exporting Conway RData to canonical study tables
description: Study-level counts for paired measurements and participants
derivation_or_transformation: Used by scripts/export_conway_rdata.py as fallback
validation_rules: must include study_id n_pairs n_participants c
notes: Keep public only if source provenance remains clear

definition: Public normalized PaCO2 prior weights for browser deployment
description: Weight-only 1 mmHg bins by group without exact count columns
units: mmHg for paco2_bin; probability weight for weight
allowed_values: group values used by app; paco2_bin numeric; weight nonnegative
source_or_origin: Restricted local PaCO2 distribution transformed for public deployment
derivation_or_transformation: Binned to 1 mmHg and normalized to weights; exact counts omitted
validation_rules: weights should be nonnegative and sum approximately 1 within group
notes: Does not expose exact count-bearing prior bins

definition: Unique Conway study/cohort identifier
description: Primary key in Conway study input table
derivation_or_transformation: Curated from source study labels
notes: Required by validate_conway_studies_df

definition: Study-level mean difference defined as PaCO2 - TcCO2
description: Input to meta-analysis and agreement model
derivation_or_transformation: Curated from Conway evidence synthesis/source tables
notes: Sign convention follows docs/SPEC.md

definition: Study-level standard deviation of PaCO2 - TcCO2 differences
missing_values: blank allowed only if s2 present
derivation_or_transformation: Curated or derived from source variance
notes: Should be consistent with s2

definition: Study-level variance of PaCO2 - TcCO2 differences
missing_values: blank allowed only if sd present
derivation_or_transformation: Usually sd squared or source variance
notes: Should be approximately sd squared when both provided

definition: Number of paired PaCO2/TcCO2 measurements contributing to a study row
description: Used for meta-analysis weights and repeated-measure handling
derivation_or_transformation: Curated from source counts
notes: May exceed participants when repeated measures exist

definition: Number of participants contributing paired measurements
description: Used with n_pairs to derive repeated-measure count c
derivation_or_transformation: Curated from source counts
notes: May be smaller than n_pairs

definition: Average paired measurements per participant
derivation_or_transformation: Usually n_pairs / n_participants
notes: Derived when omitted in package code

definition: Indicator that study row belongs to ICU subgroup
derivation_or_transformation: Curated subgroup classification
notes: See docs/CONWAY_DATA_SCHEMA.md

definition: Indicator that study row belongs to acute respiratory failure subgroup
derivation_or_transformation: Curated subgroup classification
notes: See docs/CONWAY_DATA_SCHEMA.md

definition: Indicator that study row belongs to ambulatory/PFT subgroup
derivation_or_transformation: Curated subgroup classification
notes: See docs/CONWAY_DATA_SCHEMA.md

definition: Clinical setting group for PaCO2 prior bins
value_labels: all = overall | pft = ambulatory/PFT | ed_inp = ED/inpatient | icu = ICU
derivation_or_transformation: Generated from restricted local distribution into public weights
notes: Exact counts intentionally omitted

definition: 1 mmHg PaCO2 bin center or representative value
description: Used as support for public prior and posterior calculations
derivation_or_transformation: Binned from restricted local PaCO2 distribution
notes: Public bin values do not include exact counts

definition: Normalized public prior weight for a group and PaCO2 bin
derivation_or_transformation: Exact counts converted to normalized weights
validation_rules: must be nonnegative and group sums should be approximately 1
notes: No count column should be added publicly

definition: Optional browser upload replacing default Conway study table
description: CSV or XLSX supplied by user in browser
derivation_or_transformation: Parsed client-side and passed to Pyodide worker
notes: Not transmitted to backend

definition: Optional browser upload replacing default public PaCO2 prior
description: CSV or XLSX supplied by user in browser
derivation_or_transformation: Parsed client-side and passed to Pyodide worker
notes: Not transmitted to backend

definition: Observed transcutaneous CO2 value entered in the app
description: Main scalar input for posterior inference
derivation_or_transformation: Passed to Python model in Pyodide
notes: Research-only input; not persisted

definition: PaCO2 threshold used for posterior mass and TcCO2 classification
derivation_or_transformation: Passed to Python model in Pyodide
notes: Default 45 mmHg

definition: App setting used to choose subgroup model/prior
value_labels: all = overall | pft = ambulatory/PFT | ed_inp = ED/inpatient | icu = ICU
derivation_or_transformation: Maps to model subgroup selection
validation_rules: must be one of supported values
notes: Shown as All Ambulatory/PFT ED/Inpatient ICU

definition: Canonical bootstrap parameter draws used for responsive browser defaults
allowed_values: group replicate studies delta sigma2 tau2 sd_total loa_l loa_u bootstrap_mode
derivation_or_transformation: Generated from public Conway study table and bootstrap workflow
validation_rules: must parse and include browser-required columns
notes: Staged into web app by make stage-web

definition: Aggregate operating characteristics by clinical setting
derivation_or_transformation: Generated aggregate table
validation_rules: should not contain row-level patient data
notes: Public unless future privacy review flags it

definition: Aggregate two-stage strategy outputs
derivation_or_transformation: Generated aggregate table
validation_rules: should not contain row-level patient data
notes: Public unless future privacy review flags it

definition: Aggregate TcCO2-to-PaCO2 prediction interval examples
derivation_or_transformation: Generated aggregate table
validation_rules: should not contain row-level patient data
notes: Public unless future privacy review flags it

definition: Local restricted source distribution used for full artifact rebuilds
derivation_or_transformation: Used by private rebuild_artifacts workflows when available
notes: Exact row/count-bearing source data

readable_name: Restricted local PaCO2 distribution alternate name
definition: Alternate local filename for restricted source distribution
derivation_or_transformation: Used by private rebuild_artifacts workflows when available
notes: Exact row/count-bearing source data

definition: Exact count-bearing PaCO2 prior bin output
derivation_or_transformation: Generated from restricted local PaCO2 distribution
validation_rules: must not be tracked unless explicitly approved
notes: Public app uses weight-only paco2_public_prior.csv instead

definition: Exact count-bearing PaCO2 distribution figure-data output
derivation_or_transformation: Generated from restricted local PaCO2 distribution
validation_rules: must not be tracked unless explicitly approved
notes: Exact counts may reveal restricted source distribution

definition: Generated copy of canonical data for GitHub Pages deployment
derivation_or_transformation: Copied from Data and artifacts into web assets
notes: Ignored in git and uploaded by Pages workflow

definition: Generated browser allowlist copy of Python package for Pyodide
derivation_or_transformation: Copied from src/tcco2_accuracy into web assets
notes: Ignored in git and uploaded by Pages workflow
